title: Soarwg Kids Muslin Cloth Baby Swaddle Cloths for Newborns, Pack of 3 Muslin Blanket, Large 95 x 100cm Baby Blanket - Baby Swaddle Blanket Burp Cloths, Swaddle Cloth Essential Items for Baby Shower
features: SUPER SOFT TO BABY’S SKIN: It is made of safe, natural and pure muslin cotton cloth with high-density fabric, which is very suitable for daily baby swaddling. Suitable for sensitive skin, non irritating, free from any harmful substances.

MULTI-FUNCTIONAL USES: Baby muslin swaddle blanket can be used in many different ways, support infants and parents as a tummy time blankie, nursing cover up, changing table or stroller cover. The swaddling blanket can be used all around the home or going out as they come in super handy when bathing, feeding, burping, swaddling or cleaning baby. Reusable and very soft, breathable and absorbent.

THIN, BREATHABLE & ABSORBENT: Each individual muslin swaddle blanket (95X100 cm) is thin enough to provide ample breathability, which means they can keep your little one warm and cozy in cooler weather, let their skin breathe in warmer weather. It can helps regulate your baby's body temperature and prevents overheating.

SET OF UNISEX COLORS: The package includes 3 neutral color swaddle blankets, suitable for baby boys or girls. Each piece with specifically classic prints and handpicked unisex colors that will easily match any outfit, suitable for both boys and girls! Our muslin blankets can hand wash or wash by machine with cold water and mild detergent.

ESSENTIALS BABY SHOWER GIFT: Each set are well made and neatly packaged. These durable soft muslin swaddle blankets can be a practical and thoughtful gift for baby shower, baby registration, Christmas, home heating or any special gift giving occasion.
